title: Glowberry (Cactus Mod Addon)
description: Cactus Mod Addon that adds various features
body:
# Glowberry **The Ultimate Utility Addon for Cactus Mod** **Minecraft Version:** `1.21.11` [![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-66cdaa?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowberry) [![Platform: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=fabric&logoColor=white)](https://fabricmc.net/) --- Glowberry is a comprehensive addon for [Cactus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cactus). It expands the toolkit by adding specialized modules and upgrading core systems to provide features that Cactus does not include by default. *By using this mod, you agree to the Cactus Terms of Service.* --- ## Requirements > [!IMPORTANT] > **Overlay Lib:** Required for version `1.0` only. Version `1.1` and above no longer requires this library. --- ## Features
HUD Elements
| Module | Function | | :--- | :--- | | **Pickup Log** | Shows what items you picked up or dropped in a real-time log. | | **Timer/Stopwatch** | Displays the Timer and Stopwatch modules as HUD elements. |
PvP Modules
| Module | Function | Technical Details | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **AutoClicker** | Automated clicking at a configurable rate. | Simulates game key presses for attack/use actions. | | **NoHurtCam** | Disables camera shake effects. | Removes screen shake and red tint during combat. | | **ShieldStatus** | Visual overlay for shield states. | Shows broken, active, or used states for all players. | | **TotemCounter** | Tracks Totems of Undying. | Tracks inventory count and enemy pops in the tab list. | | **Trajectory** | Visual path for projectiles. | Preview for arrows, snowballs, and eggs. *(Server Unsafe)* |
Survival Modules
| Module | Function | Technical Details | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **AppleSkin** | Food and hunger HUD. | Displays saturation, exhaustion, and hunger stats. | | **AutoFish** | Automatically catches fish. | Automatic rod casting and reeling. *(Server Unsafe)* | | **AutoTool** | Smart tool swapping. | Selects the best tool in hotbar for the current block. | | **FastPlace** | Removes placement delay. | Removes internal delay for instant building. *(Server Unsafe)* | | **HorseStats** | Detailed horse attributes. | Displays jump height, speed, and health while riding. | | **LightLevel** | Mob spawn indicator. | Identifies spawnable areas via overlays. | | **Shuffle** | Randomized building patterns. | Automatically shuffles hotbar blocks when placing to create random patterns. | | **TabList** | Enhanced player menu. | Adds numerical ping values to the player list. | | **Timer** | Countdown utility. | Set a time and a sound is played when it runs out. | | **Stopwatch** | Time tracking. | A simple stopwatch module. |
Creative & Utility
| Module | Function | Technical Details | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **BookEdit** | Enhanced book formatting. | Supports color codes (&/§) and text formatting. | | **FastBreak** | Removes block breaking delay. | Instant breaking in Creative mode only. |
--- ## Cactus Mod Changes Glowberry significantly upgrades core Cactus systems to offer more flexibility: ### Reworked Macro System The macro screen and internal system have been completely overhauled. * **Universal Content Support:** Macros now support text messages, vanilla `/` commands, and Cactus `#` commands. * **String Triggers:** In addition to standard keybinds, Glowberry introduces String Triggers. You can configure a macro to run automatically when you type a specific string in chat. --- ### Placeholder Browser Glowberry adds a dedicated in-game browser for all available Cactus and Glowberry placeholders. * **Categorized Discovery:** Browse placeholders by category (Player, World, Server, etc.). * **One-Click Copy:** Click any placeholder in the browser to automatically copy the `{key}` to your clipboard. --- ### Support & Feedback If you find any bugs or incompatibilities, please report them through the channels below. [**GitHub Issue Tracker**](https://github.com/M9MX/Glowberry/issues) • [**Contact via Discord**](https://discord.com/users/821825926944784477)
